item.title: Morning Briefing — July 09, 2026
item.description:
Good morning. It is Wednesday, July 8th, 2026, and I am here to get your day started with a briefing on the most important stories unfolding across the globe, from the latest breakthroughs in artificial intelligence to high-stakes political drama and bizarre headlines of the day.
We start in the te

item.title: Morning Briefing — July 06, 2026
item.description:
Good morning, and happy Monday. It is July 6, 2026. I hope you had a restful weekend. Let's get you caught up on the fast-paced news defining our world this morning.
We are beginning this week under the shadow of major geopolitical shifts. Following the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali
